category_sources: Official GitHub README says chkbit alerts users to data corruption during transfers, backups, and recovery.
source_facts.description says chkbit checks files for data corruption.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses chkbit as the project title.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to Chkbit Introduction and documentation pages at laktak.github.io/chkbit/.
Official GitHub README provides additional project and release documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/laktak/chkbit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include backup, dedupe, deduplication, data-integrity, disk-check, and bitrot-detection.
